name: task-manager-fullstack
description: Đồ án cuối kì - Lập trình Web Nâng cao (MERN Stack)

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix src/backend && npm install --prefix src/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix src/backend" "npm start --prefix src/frontend"
